onboarding.title: Welcome to DRS
onboarding.subtitle: Create your first profile to start your healthy planning challenge.

profile.title: Profile & Progress
profile.subtitle: Your data is saved on this device.
profile.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the current profile and all its data? This action is irreversible.
profile.name: Name
profile.noWeightData: Add your first entry to see the chart.

workout.title: Workout
workout.subtitle: Dumbbells up to 10 kg + bike
workout.completedGoal: 🎉 Congratulations! You have completed your daily goal.

w2_l1.name: Pesto Chicken and Green Beans
steps: Cook the chicken on the grill.
Spread the pesto at the end.
Serve with green beans boiled al dente to maintain fiber.

w2_d1.name: Hake en Papillote
steps: Wrap the fish and vegetables in parchment paper.
Bake at 200°C for 15 min.
Add a drizzle of raw EVOO when opening.

w2_l2.name: Grilled Beef with Broccoli
steps: Grill the beef to taste.
Mix the cold broccoli with bacon and yogurt dressing.

w2_d2.name: Express Tuna Stuffed Eggplants
steps: Roast the eggplant in the microwave for 8 min.
Mix the pulp with tuna and onion.
Fill and gratin for 2 min.

w2_l3.name: Baked Cod with Herb Crust
steps: Cover the fish with the herb crust.
Bake 15 min at 180°C.
Serve with cucumber salad.

w2_d3.name: Curry Turkey with Cauliflower
steps: Sauté the turkey with curry.
Add crushed cauliflower (rice style) and sauté everything together for 5 min.

w2_l4.name: Chicken Burgers in Lettuce Wraps
steps: Cook the burgers on the grill.
Wrap them in lettuce leaves, using them as buns.

w2_d4.name: Mushroom and Prawn Scramble
steps: Sauté mushrooms and prawns with garlic.
Add eggs and cook over low heat until set.

w2_l5.name: Baked Salmon with Zucchini Puree
steps: Bake the salmon.
Blend pre-cooked zucchini with oil to make the puree.

w2_d5.name: Pork Fillet with Arugula
steps: Cook the pork on the grill.
Serve on a bed of arugula with walnuts and parmesan shavings.

w2_l6.name: Low-Carb Caesar Salad
steps: Assemble the salad omitting croutons to avoid adding carbs.
Dress generously.

w2_d6.name: Prawn and Zucchini Skewers
steps: Assemble skewers alternating ingredients.
Cook on the grill, turning once.

w2_l7.name: Beef and Pepper Wok
steps: Sauté beef and vegetables over high heat.
Add soy sauce and grated ginger at the end.

w2_d7.name: Keto Chicken Pizza
steps: Mix chicken and egg. Spread on a tray forming the base.
Bake 12 min. Add tomato and cheese, and gratin for 5 more min.

w1_l1.name: Bio-Efficient Stewed Lentils
steps: Chop the vegetables very finely.
Sauté the garlic and onion with the oil.
Add the rest of the vegetables and the lentils.
Cover with water and cook for 40 min.

w1_d1.name: Baked Gilt-head Bream Omega-3
steps: Cut the zucchini and onion into thin slices forming a bed.
Place the fish on top with two cross cuts.
Season using spices instead of common salt to protect blood pressure.
Bake at 180°C for 20 min.

w1_l2.name: Baked Chicken with Potato
steps: Cut the potato into baker-style slices.
Place the chicken, potato and asparagus on a baking tray.
Drizzle with lemon and rosemary.
Bake at 200°C for 25-30 min.

w1_d2.name: Protein Mixed Salad
steps: Boil the egg for exactly 9 minutes to avoid oxidation.
Cut the tomato and extract the tuna.
Mix all the ingredients cold.

w1_l3.name: Chickpeas with Spinach
steps: Sauté the spinach in a pan with a little water.
Add the chickpeas and paprika.
Mix for 5 min and add the chopped egg at the end.

w1_d3.name: Mushroom Omelet
steps: Sauté the mushrooms until they release all their water.
Beat the eggs.
Cook the omelet over medium heat.

w1_l4.name: Brown Rice with Turkey
steps: Boil the brown rice (30-40 min).
Sauté the turkey with the broccoli in a pan.
Mix everything together before serving.

w1_d4.name: Salmon with Green Beans
steps: Steam the green beans for 8 minutes.
Grill the salmon for 3 min per side, starting with the skin.
Squeeze a little lemon when serving.

w1_l5.name: Whole Wheat Chicken Bolognese Pasta
steps: Cook the pasta al dente to reduce its glycemic index.
Prepare the sauce with the meat and tomato in a non-stick pan.
Mix the pasta with the sauce and garnish with basil.

w1_d5.name: Steamed Hake with Peas
steps: Place the hake, peas and chopped carrot in a steam case.
Add a pinch of dill.
Cook for 5-7 minutes steamed (or microwave).

w1_l6.name: Vegetable and Lean Pork Paella
ingredients: Flat green beans and lima beans
steps: Sauté the meat and vegetables.
Add water and saffron, bringing to a boil.
Add the rice and cook over medium heat for 18 min.

w1_d6.name: Chicken with Pumpkin Puree
steps: Mash the previously roasted pumpkin with a touch of ginger.
Grill the chicken breast.
Serve the chicken on a bed of puree.

w1_l7.name: Cod with Tomato and Peppers
steps: Ensure the cod is perfectly desalted to protect blood pressure.
Heat the tomato sauce with the peppers.
Cook the cod over low heat submerged in the sauce.

w1_d7.name: Hummus and Sardines
steps: Prepare the carrot sticks.
Drain the sardines well.
Serve cold as a healthy snack to close the week.

w2_l1.name: Mediterranean Chickpea Salad
steps: Wash the chickpeas well.
Mix with the vegetables and mackerel.
Dress with EVOO and apple cider vinegar.

w2_d1.name: Turkey with Sweet Potato Puree
steps: Roast sweet potato in microwave (8 min).
Mash the sweet potato and grill the turkey.
Serve with lamb's lettuce.

w2_l2.name: Garlic Chicken with Mushrooms
steps: Sauté chicken with sliced garlic.
Add mushrooms until golden.
Serve with boiled potatoes.

w2_d2.name: Asparagus and Prawn Scramble
steps: Sauté asparagus and prawns.
Add eggs and scramble over low heat.

w2_l3.name: Whole Wheat Penne with Tuna
steps: Boil pasta al dente.
Mix with tuna, olives and tomato.

w2_d3.name: Baked Sea Bass with Vegetables
steps: Cut and grill the vegetables.
Bake the fish 15 min at 180°C on the vegetables.

w2_l4.name: Lentils with Brown Rice
steps: Sauté the vegetables.
Add lentils, rice and vegetable broth.

w2_d4.name: Fit Chicken Burger
steps: Form burger and grill.
Serve without bread on a bed of arugula and walnuts.

w2_l5.name: Grilled Cuttlefish
steps: Grill cuttlefish over high heat with garlic.
Serve with steamed potato and beans.

w2_d5.name: Vegetable Cream Soup
steps: Boil vegetables and blend without cream.
Add chopped egg on top.

w2_l6.name: Whole Wheat Couscous with Beef
steps: Hydrate couscous with boiling water.
Sauté beef and peppers, and mix.

w2_d6.name: Turkey and Pineapple Skewers
steps: Skewer alternating turkey and pineapple.
Grill and serve with spinach.

w2_l7.name: Light Tuna Marmitako
steps: Stew the potato with vegetables.
Add tuna at the end with the heat off.

w2_d7.name: Mediterranean Board
ingredients: 1 hard-boiled egg and 3 slices cured loin
steps: Serve on a mezze style board. No cooking required.

w3_l1.name: Stewed White Beans
steps: Wash canned beans thoroughly.
Sauté vegetables, add beans and water.
Cook 10 min.

w3_d1.name: Steamed Chicken with Whole Grain Mustard
steps: Steam broccoli and chicken (12 min).
Spread mustard at the end.

w3_l2.name: Navarre Style Trout
steps: Place ham inside the trout.
Bake at 180°C for 15 min.
Serve with potato.

w3_d2.name: Popeye Spinach Cream
steps: Boil potato and spinach with little water.
Blend and add chopped hard-boiled egg.

w3_l3.name: Turkey Stuffed Peppers
steps: Hollow out the peppers.
Stuff with the sautéed turkey and rice mixture.
Bake 25 min at 190°C.

w3_d3.name: Cuttlefish with Artichokes
steps: Sauté cuttlefish over high heat.
Add artichokes and garlic at the end.

w3_l4.name: Quinoa with Chicken and Vegetables
steps: Wash quinoa and boil 12 min.
Sauté chicken and vegetables, and mix with quinoa.

w3_d4.name: Mushroom and Radish Omelet
steps: Make omelet with sautéed mushrooms.
Serve raw sliced radishes on the side.

w3_l5.name: Herb Crusted Cod
steps: Brush cod with EVOO and herbs.
Bake alongside asparagus 12 min at 200°C.

w3_d5.name: Zucchini and Tuna Carpaccio
steps: Slice raw zucchini very thinly.
Top with tuna, lemon, pepper and parmesan.

w3_l6.name: Light Beef Goulash
steps: Sear the meat.
Add vegetables, cover with broth and simmer for 1.5 hours.

w3_d6.name: Swordfish with Baba Ganoush
steps: Mash roasted eggplant with lemon.
Grill the fish.

w3_l7.name: Fit Potato Omelet
steps: Cook sliced potato steamed or in microwave (7 min).
Mix with egg and cook with a drop of oil.

w3_d7.name: Baked Prawns and Hummus
steps: Bake prawns with garlic and parsley (6 min).
Serve with hummus and raw carrot.

w4_l1.name: Turkey Meatballs
steps: Form the meatballs and grill them.
Cook in tomato sauce with peas.

w4_d1.name: Gourmet Spinach Salad
steps: Grill the chicken.
Assemble the salad raw, mixing everything.

w4_l2.name: Chickpea and Chard Stew
steps: Sauté garlic with paprika and cumin to prevent gas.
Add chard, chickpeas and water. Cook 15 min.

w4_d2.name: Zucchini and Onion Scramble
steps: Sauté finely chopped vegetables.
Add beaten eggs and ham.
Scramble over low heat.

w4_l3.name: Whole Wheat Spaghetti with Prawns
steps: Sauté garlic and chili in EVOO.
Add prawns and mix with pasta cooked al dente.

w4_d3.name: Orange Chicken Breast
steps: Grill the chicken.
Add the juice and let it reduce.
Serve with steamed asparagus.

w4_l4.name: Lentil and Sardine Salad
steps: Drain sardines very well.
Mix everything cold for an extra dose of Omega-3.

w4_d4.name: Baked Cod
steps: Place the almonds on the fish.
Bake 12 min at 180°C and serve with steamed broccoli.

w4_l5.name: Brown Rice with Mushrooms and Rabbit
steps: Make a sofrito with the meat and mushrooms.
Add the rice and broth, and cook until tender.

w4_d5.name: Turkey and Light Cheese Omelet
steps: Beat eggs and put in the pan.
Fold cheese and turkey in the center to melt.

w4_l6.name: Beef Stuffed Eggplants
steps: Hollow out eggplant and sauté pulp with meat.
Stuff the boat and bake 20 min.

w4_d6.name: Hake and Prawn Skewers
steps: Assemble skewers and grill them.
Serve with steamed green beans.

w4_l7.name: Potatoes with Squid
steps: Make a sofrito with the onion.
Add squid, potato, bay leaf and broth. Stew over low heat.

w4_d7.name: Fridge Cleaning Dinner
steps: Assemble a cold mixed plate snack style.
Enjoy the end of the week.

journey.title: Your 90-Day Challenge
journey.startPrompt: You haven't started your plan yet. Set the start date to begin counting the 90 days.

warnings.high_sodium: ⚠️ Warning: High sodium. May cause water retention.
warnings.plan_high_sodium: ⚠️ Warning: Drink 500ml extra water today to compensate for sodium.

stats.title: Analytics & Export
stats.subtitle: Visualize your progress and export your data.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.disclaimer_text: This application is in the development phase and needs your help to be completed and improved. Please be critical and help me make an unbeatably great app.
welcome.credits: App created by Ulises Pérez López, Junior AI App Developer and student in programming and development in AI environments.

chicken_rice.name: Chicken Rice with Vegetables
steps: Sauté vegetables.
Add chicken.
Cook rice meanwhile and combine.

spinach_omelette.name: Spinach Omelette
steps: Sauté garlic and spinach.
Whisk eggs and cook in pan.

quick_lentils.name: Quick Lentils
steps: Sauté vegetables.
Add lentils and a splash of water, cook 10 min.

tuna_pasta.name: Whole Wheat Tuna Pasta
steps: Cook pasta.
Mix warm tomato sauce with drained tuna.

zucchini_cream.name: Zucchini Cream Soup
steps: Boil vegetables.
Blend adding the cheese.

chickpea_salad.name: Chickpea Salad
steps: Rinse chickpeas.
Chop fresh vegetables and dress.

lemon_chicken_sweetpotato.name: Lemon Chicken with Sweet Potato
steps: Microwave sweet potato (8 min).
Pan-grill chicken with lemon.

broken_eggs.name: Broken Eggs (Huevos Rotos)
steps: Bake potato slices in oven/microwave.
Fry eggs on top.

avocado_turkey_toast.name: Avocado Turkey Toast
steps: Toast the bread.
Spread avocado and place turkey on top.

egg_white_mushroom.name: Egg White & Mushroom Scramble
steps: Sauté mushrooms with garlic.
Add egg whites and scramble.

apple_porridge.name: Apple Oat Porridge
steps: Cook oats with milk for 5 min.
Add diced apple and cinnamon.

stuffed_peppers_soy.name: Soy-Stuffed Peppers
steps: Hydrate soy and mix with tomato.
Stuff peppers and bake 25 min.

express_couscous.name: Express Couscous
steps: Boil equal parts broth and couscous.
Pour over couscous, cover 5 min and fluff.

grilled_eggplant_cheese.name: Grilled Eggplant with Cheese
steps: Slice eggplant and grill.
Serve with cheese slices on top.

protein_smoothie_bowl.name: Protein Smoothie Bowl
steps: Blend banana, strawberries and quark.
Serve very cold in a bowl.

w1_d1.breakfast: Coffee with skim milk + Rye toast (60g) with tomato and 10g EVOO + 2 slices of turkey.
w1_d1.lunch: Stewed lentils with carrot, pepper and onion (250g cooked) + Green salad.
w1_d1.dinner: Baked sea bream on zucchini and onion bed + 1 slice fresh pineapple.

w1_d2.breakfast: Greek yogurt 0% with 30g oats and blueberries + Coffee with milk.
w1_d2.lunch: Baked chicken (200g) with Provençal herbs and roasted potato (150g) + Wild asparagus.
w1_d2.dinner: Complete Mixed Salad: Tuna, hard-boiled egg, lamb's lettuce, tomato and olives.

w1_d3.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Whole wheat sandwich with cream cheese and arugula.
w1_d3.lunch: Chickpeas with spinach and paprika (250g cooked) + 1 slice whole wheat bread.
w1_d3.dinner: French omelette (2 eggs) with sautéed mushrooms and tomato salad.

w1_d4.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with avocado (50g) and poached egg.
w1_d4.lunch: Brown rice with stir-fried vegetables (mushrooms, broccoli) and turkey strips (150g).
w1_d4.dinner: Grilled salmon (150g) with boiled green beans and a squeeze of lemon.

w1_d5.breakfast: Greek yogurt 0% with oats and 1 chopped walnut + Coffee.
w1_d5.lunch: Whole wheat pasta (70g dry) with tomato sauce, basil and chicken mince (100g).
w1_d5.dinner: Steamed hake with peas and baby carrots. Dressing: 5ml EVOO.

w1_d6.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Small whole wheat roll with cured ham and tomato.
w1_d6.lunch: Vegetable and lean meat paella (Moderate portion: 200g) + Cucumber salad.
w1_d6.dinner: Grilled chicken breast with pumpkin purée and ginger.

w1_d7.breakfast: Omelette with 2 whites and 1 yolk with spinach + Coffee with milk.
w1_d7.lunch: Cod with tomato and roasted peppers + 2 whole wheat crackers.
w1_d7.dinner: Healthy Tapas: Hummus (80g) with carrot sticks and 1 can sardines in EVOO.

w2_d1.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast (60g) with cottage cheese and sliced strawberries.
w2_d1.lunch: Chickpea Salad: 200g chickpeas, cucumber, pepper, red onion and 1 can mackerel.
w2_d1.dinner: Grilled turkey breast with sweet potato purée (100g) and lamb's lettuce.

w2_d2.breakfast: Greek yogurt 0% with 30g oats and 1 kiwi + Coffee with milk.
w2_d2.lunch: Garlic rabbit or chicken (200g) with mushrooms and 2 small roasted potatoes.
w2_d2.dinner: Asparagus and prawn scramble (2 eggs) + Tomato salad.

w2_d3.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Whole wheat sandwich with cooked ham and tomato slices.
w2_d3.lunch: Whole wheat penne (70g dry) with tuna, olives and homemade tomato sauce.
w2_d3.dinner: Baked sea bass with roasted red peppers and grilled eggplant.

w2_d4.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with avocado (50g) and chia seeds.
w2_d4.lunch: Lentils with brown rice: 150g cooked lentils + 50g cooked rice + vegetables.
w2_d4.snack: Cottage cheese (150g) with a touch of cinnamon.
w2_d4.dinner: Chicken burger (no bun) with arugula salad, walnuts and roasted onion.

w2_d5.breakfast: Omelette with 2 whites and 1 yolk with turkey + Coffee with skim milk.
w2_d5.lunch: Grilled cuttlefish with garlic and parsley + Potato salad (150g) with green beans.
w2_d5.dinner: Seasonal vegetable cream soup (no cream) + Simple French omelette.

w2_d6.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with olive oil (10ml) and cured ham.
w2_d6.lunch: Whole wheat couscous with vegetables and lean beef strips (120g) + Sautéed peppers.
w2_d6.dinner: Turkey and pineapple skewers with fresh spinach salad.

w2_d7.breakfast: Oat porridge (40g) with milk and half diced apple + Coffee.
w2_d7.lunch: Light Tuna Marmitako (tuna, potato, pepper, onion) + Cucumber salad.
w2_d7.dinner: Mediterranean Platter: Hummus, 1 hard-boiled egg, celery sticks and 3 slices cured loin.

w3_d1.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with fried egg (little oil) and pepper.
w3_d1.lunch: White bean stew with plenty of vegetables (green beans, carrot and pumpkin).
w3_d1.dinner: Chicken breast with steamed broccoli and a touch of whole grain mustard.

w3_d2.breakfast: Oat porridge (40g) with apple and cinnamon + Coffee with milk.
w3_d2.lunch: Navarra-style trout (baked with a slice of cured ham inside) + 150g boiled potato.
w3_d2.dinner: Spinach cream soup (dairy-free) + 1 chopped hard-boiled egg on top.

w3_d3.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with turkey and fresh tomato slices.
w3_d3.lunch: Peppers stuffed with turkey and brown rice (70g cooked rice + 100g minced turkey).
w3_d3.dinner: Sautéed cuttlefish with artichokes and garlic.

w3_d4.breakfast: Greek yogurt 0% with 30g oats and 1 kiwi + Coffee with milk.
w3_d4.lunch: Quinoa with chicken and vegetables: 60g quinoa (dry), 150g chicken, zucchini and pepper.
w3_d4.dinner: Mushroom omelette (2 eggs) with lamb's lettuce and radish salad.

w3_d5.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with avocado (50g) and a squeeze of lemon.
w3_d5.lunch: Herb-crusted baked cod on asparagus and onion bed.
w3_d5.dinner: Zucchini carpaccio with tuna, lemon, pepper and 5g Parmesan.

w3_d6.breakfast: Scramble with 2 whites and 1 yolk with fresh spinach + Coffee with milk.
w3_d6.lunch: Lean beef stew with peas, carrot and a splash of white wine.
w3_d6.dinner: Grilled swordfish with roasted eggplant purée.

w3_d7.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with EVOO (10ml) and rubbed garlic clove.
w3_d7.lunch: Healthy potato tortilla (steamed potato) + Tomato and cucumber salad.
w3_d7.dinner: Baked prawns with garlic and parsley + Hummus with carrot sticks.

w4_d1.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with fresh cheese and walnuts (15g).
w4_d1.lunch: Homemade turkey meatballs in tomato sauce with peas.
w4_d1.dinner: Spinach salad with strawberries, goat cheese (20g) and chicken strips.

w4_d2.breakfast: Oat porridge (40g) with blueberries and flaxseed + Coffee.
w4_d2.lunch: Chickpea and chard stew (or spinach) with a touch of cumin.
w4_d2.dinner: Zucchini and onion scramble (2 eggs) + 2 slices lean cured ham.

w4_d3.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Whole wheat sandwich with tuna and lamb's lettuce.
w4_d3.lunch: Whole wheat spaghetti with prawns, garlic, chili and 10ml EVOO.
w4_d3.snack: Greek yogurt 0% with half a diced pear.
w4_d3.dinner: Orange chicken breast (cooked in natural juice) with asparagus.

w4_d4.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with avocado and poached egg.
w4_d4.lunch: Cold Lentil Salad: pepper, onion, tomato and 1 can sardines (drained).

w4_d5.breakfast: Low-fat quark (200g) with 10g walnuts and cinnamon + Coffee with milk.
w4_d5.lunch: Brown rice with mushrooms and rabbit (or chicken) + Radish salad.
w4_d5.dinner: Turkey and light cheese omelette + Pumpkin cream soup.

w4_d6.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with tomato, EVOO and a pinch of oregano.
w4_d6.lunch: Eggplants stuffed with lean beef mince and vegetables (no cheese gratin).
w4_d6.dinner: Grilled hake and prawn skewers with green beans.

w4_d7.breakfast: Scrambled eggs (2) with mushrooms + Coffee with skim milk.
w4_d7.lunch: Potato stew with squid (or cuttlefish) and peas + Mixed salad.
w4_d7.dinner: Fridge Clearance: Hummus, hard-boiled egg, roasted peppers and turkey sticks.

med.title: Mediterranean Plan · 28 Days
med.subtitle: Clinically balanced menu for healthy weight loss
med.milestone_w4: Congratulations, Ulises! You have completed your first month of metabolic optimization. Your blood pressure should start to stabilize.

w1_d1.breakfast: Scrambled eggs (2) with 50g avocado and coffee.
w1_d1.lunch: Lemon chicken breast with a mountain of sautéed broccoli in EVOO.
w1_d1.dinner: Grilled salmon with wild asparagus and arugula salad.

w1_d2.breakfast: 0% Greek yogurt with 15g walnuts and chia seeds + Coffee.
w1_d2.lunch: Keto Salad: Lamb's lettuce, tuna, hard-boiled egg, olives, and 30g feta cheese.
w1_d2.dinner: Lean beef sautéed with red and green peppers.

w1_d3.breakfast: 2-egg French omelette with 2 slices of extra lean ham + Coffee.
w1_d3.lunch: Baked hake on a bed of zucchini and onion (no potato).
w1_d3.dinner: Beef burger (no bun) with cheddar cheese, pickle, and lettuce.

w1_d4.breakfast: Coffee with milk + 2 poached eggs on 1 small slice of rye bread.
w1_d4.lunch: Roasted chicken thighs (skinless) with cauliflower gratin.
w1_d4.dinner: Shrimp and vegetable wok: Zucchini, carrot, mushrooms, and soy sprouts.

w1_d5.breakfast: Protein shake (Whey) with almond milk and 10g peanut butter.
w1_d5.lunch: Lean pork loin with spinach salad, walnuts, and mustard dressing.
w1_d5.dinner: Zoodles (zucchini spaghetti) with minced turkey and fresh tomato.

w1_d6.breakfast: Scrambled eggs with mushrooms and a touch of shredded cheese + Coffee.
w1_d6.lunch: Steamed fresh cod with green beans and fried garlic.
w1_d6.dinner: Grilled turkey breast with cauliflower puree.

w1_d7.breakfast: 0% Greek yogurt with strawberries and flaxseed + Coffee.
w1_d7.lunch: Entrecote or beef fillet with Padrón peppers and mixed salad.
w1_d7.snack: 1 celery stalk with a bit of light cream cheese.
w1_d7.dinner: Tuna and spinach omelette + 50g avocado on the side.

w2_d1.breakfast: 2-egg omelette with 30g goat cheese and spinach.
w2_d1.lunch: Pesto Chicken: 200g breast with basil and pine nut sauce + Green beans.
w2_d1.dinner: Hake en papillote with asparagus and roasted peppers.

w2_d2.breakfast: Magerquark (200g) with 10g pumpkin seeds and raspberries.
w2_d2.lunch: Grilled beef (180g) with cold broccoli salad and crispy bacon.
w2_d2.dinner: Eggplants stuffed with tuna: 2 cans in water, onion, and a touch of shredded cheese.

w2_d3.breakfast: Coffee + 2 fried eggs (light EVOO) with 50g avocado.
w2_d3.lunch: Baked fresh cod with herb crust and cucumber salad.
w2_d3.dinner: Curry turkey breast with sautéed cauliflower.

w2_d4.breakfast: Protein shake with coconut milk and cinnamon.
w2_d4.lunch: Homemade chicken burgers wrapped in lettuce leaves with tomato and onion.
w2_d4.dinner: Mushroom and shrimp scramble with a touch of garlic and parsley.

w2_d5.breakfast: 2-white and 1-yolk omelette with tuna + Coffee with milk.
w2_d5.dinner: Lean pork fillet with arugula salad, walnuts, and parmesan.

w2_d6.breakfast: Scrambled eggs with 1 slice of chopped Serrano ham + Coffee.
w2_d6.lunch: Low-Carb Caesar Salad: Chicken, lettuce, hard-boiled egg, anchovies, and dressing.
w2_d6.dinner: Grilled shrimp and zucchini skewers with tomato salad.

w2_d7.breakfast: Magerquark with 15g walnuts and a touch of 100% pure cocoa.
w2_d7.lunch: Beef and pepper wok with low-sodium soy and ginger.
w2_d7.dinner: Keto Pizza: Minced chicken and egg base, with tomato, oregano, and cheese.

w3_d1.breakfast: Scrambled eggs (2) with 30g feta cheese and spinach.
w3_d1.lunch: Sesame chicken breast with sautéed green beans.
w3_d1.dinner: Zucchini and leek cream + 150g steamed hake.

w3_d2.breakfast: Magerquark (200g) with 15g almonds and vanilla extract.
w3_d2.lunch: Beef with broccoli and ginger in low-sodium soy sauce.
w3_d2.dinner: Spinach salad, walnuts, hard-boiled egg, and 50g avocado.

w3_d3.breakfast: 2 poached eggs with 50g smoked salmon (watch sodium, do not add salt).
w3_d3.lunch: Lean pork loin with Savoy cabbage sautéed with garlic and paprika.
w3_d3.dinner: Baked sea bream with red peppers and onion.

w3_d4.breakfast: 2-egg French omelette with mushrooms and parsley + Coffee.
w3_d4.lunch: Baked trout with wild asparagus salad and lemon.
w3_d4.dinner: Cauliflower rice with minced turkey and Mexican spices.

w3_d5.breakfast: 0% Greek yogurt with 15g sunflower seeds and cinnamon.
w3_d5.lunch: Baked chicken thighs with spices and cucumber-yogurt salad (Tzatziki light).
w3_d5.dinner: Zoodles (zucchini) with garlic shrimp and a touch of chili.

w3_d6.breakfast: Scrambled eggs with 1 slice of ham and coffee.
w3_d6.lunch: Beef entrecote with assorted mushrooms and garlic.

w3_d7.breakfast: Keto Pancakes: 1 egg, 30g almond flour, and a splash of milk.
w3_d7.lunch: White fish in green sauce with clams and white asparagus.
w3_d7.dinner: Cauliflower tabbouleh: Minced cauliflower, tomato, cucumber, parsley, and lemon.

w4_d1.breakfast: 2 fried eggs (light EVOO) with 50g avocado and coffee.
w4_d1.lunch: Rosemary chicken breast with sautéed green beans and garlic.
w4_d1.dinner: Baked hake with herb crust and arugula salad.

w4_d2.lunch: Beef meatballs in tomato and pepper sauce.
w4_d2.dinner: Turkey and broccoli wok with ginger and soy sauce.

w4_d3.breakfast: 2-egg French omelette with Emmental cheese (20g) + Coffee.
w4_d3.lunch: Steamed cod with sautéed spinach and pine nuts.
w4_d3.dinner: Roasted chicken salad, pumpkin seeds, tomato, and cucumber.

w4_d4.breakfast: Magerquark (200g) with 15g walnuts and a touch of cinnamon.
w4_d4.lunch: Beef entrecote with Padrón peppers and mixed salad.
w4_d4.dinner: Zoodles (zucchini) with garlic shrimp and chili.

w4_d5.breakfast: Scrambled eggs (2) with mushrooms and fresh parsley.
w4_d5.lunch: Lean pork tenderloin with Brussels sprouts and bacon.
w4_d5.dinner: Grilled salmon with wild asparagus and lemon.

w4_d6.breakfast: 2-white and 1-yolk omelette with basil pesto + Coffee.
w4_d6.lunch: Roasted turkey breast with baked vegetables (pepper, onion, eggplant).
w4_d6.dinner: Beef and mushroom stir-fry with garlic and parsley.

w4_d7.breakfast: 2 fried eggs with 2 slices of Serrano ham (no fat).
w4_d7.lunch: Sea bass or sea bream with cauliflower puree and tomato salad.
w4_d7.dinner: Keto chicken pizza: Minced chicken base with tomato and mozzarella.

w1_d1.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with avocado (50g) and 1 poached egg.
w1_d1.lunch: Stewed lentils with vegetables (carrot, bell pepper, potato) + Tomato salad.
w1_d1.dinner: Scrambled eggs with spinach and pine nuts (2 eggs) + 1 slice of whole wheat bread.

w1_d2.breakfast: Greek yogurt 0% with 30g oats and blueberries + Coffee.
w1_d2.lunch: Chickpea Curry: 200g chickpeas, spinach and light coconut milk + 40g brown rice.
w1_d2.dinner: Grilled Tofu Burger with roasted vegetables (eggplant and zucchini).

w1_d3.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Whole wheat sandwich with whipped fresh cheese, cucumber and dill.
w1_d3.lunch: Whole Wheat Pasta with Lentil Bolognese: 70g pasta + tomato sauce and minced lentils.
w1_d3.dinner: Wild asparagus omelet (2 eggs) with arugula and parmesan salad (10g).

w1_d4.breakfast: Oatmeal porridge (40g) with soy milk (unsweetened) and walnuts + Coffee.
w1_d4.lunch: Royal Quinoa with Vegetables and Smoked Tofu (100g tofu) + A handful of peas.
w1_d4.dinner: Pumpkin and Ginger Cream + 1 chopped hard-boiled egg + Flax seeds.

w1_d5.breakfast: Scrambled eggs (2) with mushrooms and parsley + Coffee with milk.
w1_d5.lunch: White Bean Stew with Swiss chard and a touch of smoked paprika.
w1_d5.dinner: Peppers stuffed with whole wheat couscous and roasted vegetables + Feta cheese (20g).

w1_d6.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with tomato, EVOO and fresh cheese (40g).
w1_d6.lunch: Vegetarian Paella: Rice, artichokes, flat green beans and lima beans.
w1_d6.dinner: Grilled Tempeh and pineapple skewers with lamb's lettuce salad.

w1_d7.breakfast: Greek yogurt 0% with 15g walnuts and 1 tsp honey + Coffee.
w1_d7.lunch: Shakshuka: 2 poached eggs in tomato sauce, peppers and spices + Rye bread.
w1_d7.dinner: Homemade Hummus (100g) with carrot sticks, cucumber and 1 hard-boiled egg.

w2_d1.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with Cottage cheese, cucumber and chia seeds.
w2_d1.lunch: Quinoa and Black Bean Salad: 60g quinoa (dry), 100g beans, corn and avocado.
w2_d1.dinner: Mushroom and Tofu Scramble: 2 eggs, 100g crumbled tofu and garlic.

w2_d2.breakfast: Magerquark (200g) with 30g oats and raspberries + Coffee.
w2_d2.lunch: Vegetarian Moussaka: Eggplant and lentil layers (150g) with zucchini bechamel.
w2_d2.dinner: Grilled Halloumi or Feta cheese (60g) with roasted peppers and lamb's lettuce.

w2_d3.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Whole wheat sandwich with hard-boiled egg, tomato and fresh spinach.
w2_d3.lunch: Chickpea Pasta with Pesto: 70g legume pasta, cherry tomato and basil.
w2_d3.snack: Whipped fresh cheese with 10g pumpkin seeds.
w2_d3.dinner: Broccoli and light Cheddar Cream + 1 chopped hard-boiled egg on top.

w2_d4.breakfast: Oatmeal porridge (40g) with almond milk, cinnamon and 10g peanut butter.
w2_d4.lunch: Tempeh and Vegetable Stir-fry: 120g tempeh, peppers, carrot and peanuts (10g).
w2_d4.dinner: Peppers stuffed with Ricotta and Spinach (200g spinach, 60g ricotta) baked.

w2_d5.breakfast: Scrambled eggs (2) with 1 slice of light cheese and oregano + Coffee with milk.
w2_d5.lunch: Red Lentil Dahl: 80g red lentils, turmeric, cumin and cauliflower rice.
w2_d5.dinner: Asparagus and Onion Omelet (2 eggs) + Radish and cucumber salad.

w2_d6.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with tomato, EVOO and 2 slices of emmental cheese.
w2_d6.lunch: Baked Falafel with Hummus: 5 homemade falafels, 60g hummus and whole wheat pita bread.
w2_d6.dinner: Zucchini and Egg Pancakes: 2 eggs, grated zucchini and a little oat flour.

w2_d7.breakfast: Magerquark with 15g walnuts, blueberries and flax seeds + Coffee.
w2_d7.lunch: Mushroom and Brown Rice Risotto: 70g brown rice, boletus or mushrooms and parmesan (10g).
w2_d7.dinner: Eggplant Pizza: Large eggplant slices as base, tomato, cheese and basil.

w3_d1.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with Hüttenkäse (cottage cheese) and radishes.
w3_d1.lunch: Warm Lentil and Quinoa Salad: 100g lentils, 40g quinoa, peppers and onion.
w3_d1.dinner: Zucchini and Goat Cheese Omelet (2 eggs, 20g cheese) + Green salad.

w3_d2.breakfast: Magerquark (200g) with 30g oats and 1 chopped apple + Coffee.
w3_d2.lunch: Chickpea and Pumpkin Stew: 200g chickpeas, lots of pumpkin, cumin and spinach.
w3_d2.dinner: Tofu marinated in soy and ginger, grilled with wild asparagus.

w3_d3.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Whole wheat sandwich with hard-boiled egg, avocado (40g) and lamb's lettuce.
w3_d3.lunch: Whole Wheat Pasta with Broccoli Pesto: 70g pasta, crushed broccoli, garlic and 10g parmesan.
w3_d3.snack: Whipped fresh cheese with 10g chia seeds.
w3_d3.dinner: White Vegetable Cream (Leek, cauliflower, onion) + 1 poached egg.

w3_d4.breakfast: Oatmeal porridge (40g) with almond milk, cinnamon and raspberries + Coffee.
w3_d4.lunch: Whole Wheat Couscous with Vegetables and Almonds: 60g couscous, zucchini, carrot and 15g almonds.
w3_d4.dinner: Black Bean Burger (homemade) with cucumber and tomato salad.

w3_d5.breakfast: Scrambled eggs (2) with cherry tomato and oregano + Coffee with milk.
w3_d5.lunch: Barley or Brown Rice Risotto with mixed mushrooms and a touch of nutritional yeast.
w3_d5.dinner: Roasted Peppers stuffed with Omelet: Beaten egg inside the pepper and baked.

w3_d6.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with peanut butter (15g) and banana.
w3_d6.lunch: Seitan Stew with Potatoes: 120g seitan, 150g potato, peas and tomato sauce.
w3_d6.dinner: Zucchini Spaghetti (Zoodles) with ricotta cheese sauce (60g) and walnuts.

w3_d7.breakfast: Greek yogurt 0% with 15g walnuts and flax seeds + Coffee.
w3_d7.lunch: Vegetarian Burrito: Whole wheat tortilla, refried beans (fat-free), lettuce and pico de gallo.
w3_d7.dinner: Beetroot Hummus (100g) with carrot crudités and 2 hard-boiled eggs.

w4_d1.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with avocado (50g) and 1 grilled egg.
w4_d1.lunch: Textured Soy Bolognese: 60g soy, natural tomato and 70g whole wheat pasta.
w4_d1.dinner: Scrambled Green Beans and Garlic: 2 eggs + 1 slice of whole wheat bread.

w4_d2.breakfast: Magerquark (200g) with 30g oats and raspberries + Coffee.
w4_d2.lunch: Red Bean and Pepper Stew: 200g beans, onion and paprika.
w4_d2.dinner: Grilled Tempeh (120g) with lamb's lettuce and radish salad.

w4_d3.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Whole wheat sandwich with Cottage cheese, tomato and basil.
w4_d3.lunch: Chickpea and Feta Salad: 150g chickpeas, 30g feta, cucumber and olives.
w4_d3.snack: Whipped fresh cheese with 10g sunflower seeds.
w4_d3.dinner: Mushroom and Leek Cream (no cream) + 1 chopped hard-boiled egg.

w4_d4.breakfast: Oatmeal porridge (40g) with soy milk, cinnamon and 1 walnut + Coffee.
w4_d4.lunch: Smoked Tofu and Broccoli Stir-fry: 120g tofu, red pepper and bean sprouts.
w4_d4.dinner: Peppers stuffed with Quinoa and roasted vegetables + 5ml EVOO.

w4_d5.breakfast: Scrambled eggs (2) with spinach and a touch of pepper + Coffee.
w4_d5.lunch: Potato and Artichoke Stew: 150g potato, 4 artichokes and peas.
w4_d5.dinner: Wild Asparagus Omelet (2 eggs) + 50g avocado on the side.

w4_d6.breakfast: Coffee with milk + Rye toast with tomato, EVOO and fresh cheese (40g).
w4_d6.lunch: Mushroom and Vegetable Paella: Brown rice (70g), boletus and flat green beans.
w4_d6.dinner: Eggplant and Cheese Burger: 1 roasted eggplant, light cheese and salad.

w4_d7.breakfast: Greek yogurt 0% with 15g walnuts and chia seeds + Coffee.
w4_d7.lunch: Lettuce and Lentil Tacos: Lettuce leaves, spiced lentils and pico de gallo.
w4_d7.dinner: Closing Vegetarian Board: Hummus, 2 hard-boiled eggs, crudités and 10g parmesan.
